options.content:
# SUNPOR Edge Infrastructure
Select **Server** from the top bar. Host metrics use **node-exporter**; containers use **cAdvisor**.

**If container panels show No data:** cAdvisor must mount `/var/run/docker.sock`. Check **Docker API Linked** in Diagnostics — must be > 0.

panels.title: Running Containers
panels.description: Running Docker containers only (excludes systemd cgroups)

targets.expr: (count(count by (name) (container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+"}))) or (count(count by (device) (container_memory_usage_bytes{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", device=~"^overlay_.*", id="/"})))

panels.title: Container Overview
panels.description: Live snapshot of all running containers on the selected server.

panels.title: Container CPU Usage
panels.description: Docker containers only — legend shows image name

targets.expr: ((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*sunpor-backend.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*backend-backend.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", container_label_com_docker_compose_service="backend"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*sunpor-timescaledb.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*timescaledb.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", container_label_com_docker_compose_service=~"timescaledb|db"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*sunpor-mqtt.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*mosquitto.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", container_label_com_docker_compose_service="mqtt"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*sunpor-frontend.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*frontend-frontend.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", container_label_com_docker_compose_service="frontend"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*mqtt-subscriber.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*mqqtsubscriber.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", container_label_com_docker_compose_service=~"mqtt-subscriber|subscriber"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*node-exporter.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*node-exporter.*"}))) or on() vector(0)

((count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", name=~".*cadvisor.*"}) or count(container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+", image=~".*cadvisor.*"}))) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Container Metric Series (Docker)
panels.description: Should match docker ps count (~6 on edge-s01)

targets.expr: (count(count by (name) (container_last_seen{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", name=~".+", image=~".+"}))) or (count(count by (device) (container_memory_usage_bytes{job="$server", instance=~".*:8080", device=~"^overlay_.*", id="/"})))

panels.title: Docker API Linked
panels.description: 0 = cAdvisor cannot see Docker (mount docker.sock). Service panels need this > 0.
